root_cause: autoSave() returns immediately when _saveInProgress is true. Any updateSetting call that arrives while a save is in flight silently drops the save trigger. The in-progress save took a snapshot of _settings at start, so it does not include the new change. When the save completes it sets _saveInProgress = false but does not re-check for pending dirty state.
fix: Track a _pendingSave dirty flag. When autoSave is already in progress, set _pendingSave = true instead of returning. After the save completes in the finally block, check if _pendingSave is true and trigger another save if so.
root_cause_keywords: snapshot does not include new changes
